# Goldman Kremlinology & WaPo Denouement

Biden Backup Plans, CNN’s Debate Hangover, A Picasso Surprise
 ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

| |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | |  | | --- | | [View email in browser](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dRYjhiMlE0dC05bEdxNEFBaWpRVT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvbmV3c2xldHRlcl9hcmNoaXZlcy90aGUtZGFpbHktY291cmFudC8_) | | [The Daily Courant](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dRYjhiMlE0dC05bEdxNEFBaWpRVT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvbmV3c2xldHRlcl9hcmNoaXZlcy90aGUtZGFpbHktY291cmFudC8_) | | |  | | --- | | **Biden Backup Plans, CNN’s Debate Hangover, A Picasso Surprise** | | Welcome back to The Daily Courant, your afternoon guide to the best new work at Puck.     Today, we lead with **Dylan Byers** ’ double-barreled reporting on the two biggest stories preoccupying the Washington media: the latest beats in the *Washington Post* crisis and the postmortem on CNN’s ratings bonanza in Atlanta.     Plus, below the fold: **Bill Cohan** examines Goldman’s new rainmaker and a potential M&A plot twist in **Zaslav** ’s Hollywood story. **Marion Maneker** uncovers a weak London art market propped up by a **Basquiat** boom. On *The Town* , **Matt Belloni** gabs with **Ben Smith** about whether last week’s political trainwreck will reinvigorate cable news. And on a very special Media Monday edition of *The Powers That Be* , **Jon Kelly** joins **Peter Hamby** to discuss the media fallout from the **Biden** debacle and the latest twist in the *WaPo* saga. | |  | | [‘Post’ Script & CNN’s Debate Hangover](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dRYjhiMlE0dC05bEdxNEFBaWpRVT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvY25uLWRlYmF0ZS1oYW5nb3Zlci1wb3N0LXNjcmlwdC8_) | | DYLAN BYERS | | News and notes on the two biggest stories in Washington media: the latest beats in the WaPo crisis and the post-mortem on CNN’s big night in Atlanta. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Advanced Zazonomics & Goldman Kremlinology](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dRYjhiMlE0dC05bEdxNEFBaWpRVT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvYWR2YW5jZWQtemF6b25vbWljcy1nb2xkbWFuLWtyZW1saW5vbG9neS8_) | | WILLIAM D. COHAN | | More news and notes on the Wall Street and media industrial complex. Plus, a fascinating detail or two about Biden’s all-important family dinner tonight at Camp David. | |  | | [A Picasso Surprise & The Basquiat Boom](https://email.puck.) | | MARION MANEKER | | The June sales in London are in the midst of being downgraded. But that doesn’t mean we can’t learn a thing or two from the tepid results, which show the market is still bottoming. Plus, a preview of the Old Master sales. | |  | | [Will the Debate Debacle Revive TV News?](https://email.puck.) | | MATTHEW BELLONI | | Matt is joined by Semafor cofounder Ben Smith to discuss how the dispiriting presidential debate will affect CNN and the TV news landscape as we move towards the 2024 election. They also take a look at the broader state of TV news as we exit the cable news era and wonder how many of these waning news networks can survive in the streaming era. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Media Monday: Biden Backup Plans & WaPo Recriminations](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dRYjhiMlE0dC05bEdxNEFBaWpRVT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvcG9kY2FzdF9lcGlzb2RlL21lZGlhLW1vbmRheS1iaWRlbi1iYWNrdXAtcGxhbnMtd2Fwby1yZWNyaW1pbmF0aW9ucy8_) | | PETER HAMBY & JON KELLY | | Jon Kelly joins Peter to discuss the media fallout from Biden’s debate debacle—the fast-moving information, the private conversation, and the real anxieties. Then they dig into the lastest turn in the Washington Post saga. | | |  | | |  | | --- | | [Puck](https://email.puck.) | | |  |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | [Facebook](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dRYjhiMlE0dC05bEdxNEFBaWpRVT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mYWNlYm9vay5jb20vcHVja2RvdG5ld3M_) | [Twitter](https://email.puck.) | [Instagram](https://email.puck.) | [LinkedIn](https://email.puck.) | | | |  | | --- | | Need help?
